Use case.q1: What is your primary use case for Linux?
Use case.a1: I want a Linux distribution for daily use
Use case.a2: I want to use Linux for anonymous web browsing
Use case.a3: I prefer a Linux distribution which is supported by game publishers
Use case.a4: I want to execute all programs in an isolated area
Use case.a6: Has Live Mode: Can be started using discs or usb sticks to test it out (before installing)

Proficiency.q1: How would you rate your proficiency using a computer?
Proficiency.a1: I often need help from others to fix problems with my computer
Proficiency.a2: I am already able to solve some computer problems by myself
Proficiency.a3: I can troubleshoot most or all computer problems by myself

Familiarity.q1: How would you rate your knowledge of Linux itself?
Familiarity.a1: I have little or no knowledge about Linux-based operating systems
Familiarity.a2: I have already used Linux-based operating systems for some purposes
Familiarity.a3: I have a good understanding about Linux-based operating systems

Pre-installed applications.q1: How many settings do you wish to tweak by yourself during installation?
Pre-installed applications.a1: I want to use the default preset values in the installation assistant
Pre-installed applications.a2: I want to choose the settings by myself
Pre-installed applications.a3: I want to configure as much as possible using graphical applications

Help.q1: How do you prefer to solve problems when they arise?
Help.a1: I am able to solve my problems using guides from wiki pages or tutorials
Help.a2: I prefer asking others for help

User Experience.q1: Which user interface style do you prefer?
User Experience.a1: I prefer a macOS-like user interface
User Experience.a2: I prefer a windows-like user interface

Scope.q1: How much software do you want included out of the box?
Scope.a1: I prefer a Linux distribution shipping all the basic programs I need to start working immediately after installation
Scope.a2: I want to choose the basic programs to install myself

Privacy.q1: How do you feel about online services and data collection?
Privacy.a2: If it improves my user experience, I agree with using such online services

Administration.q1: How do you prefer to install software on your system?
Administration.a1: I want to install my programs using a kind of 'App store'
Administration.a2: I am willing to learn how to use terminal comands for a faster installation

Updates.q1: What is your preference for software updates?
